user.title: Parcel Configuration
user.description: Set up Parcel tracking for parcelapp

init.title: Update Parcel Configuration
init.description: Update the API Key and Account Token for ParcelApp

data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often to check for parcel updates (in minutes). API rate limit: 20 requests per hour.
data_description.filter_mode: Choose which parcels to retrieve. 'Recent' includes recently completed deliveries. 'Active' shows only parcels that are still in transit or pending.

add_parcel.name: Add Parcel
add_parcel.description: Add a new parcel to ParcelApp for tracking

parcel_name.name: Parcel Name
parcel_name.description: The name of the parcel to track

tracking_number.name: Tracking Number
tracking_number.description: The tracking number of the parcel

courier.name: Courier
courier.description: The courier service handling the parcel. If omitted, the carrier will be auto-detected from the tracking number. Refer to the list of supported carrier keys at {supported_carriers_url}.

language.name: Language
language.description: Language for delivery information (ISO 639-1 two-letter code, e.g., 'en', 'de', 'fr'). Availability depends on carrier. Defaults to English.

tracking_number.name: Tracking Number
tracking_number.description: The tracking number of the parcel to delete

type.name: Courier
type.description: The courier service handling the parcel. Refer to the list of supported carrier keys, for example, for ACS Courier the key is 'acs'. The list is available at {supported_carriers_url}.

edit_parcel.name: Edit Parcel
edit_parcel.description: Edit an existing parcel in ParcelApp

parcel_name.name: Parcel Name
parcel_name.description: The updated name of the parcel

tracking_number.name: Tracking Number
tracking_number.description: The updated tracking number of the parcel

courier.name: Courier
courier.description: The updated courier service handling the parcel. If omitted, the carrier will be auto-detected from the tracking number. Refer to the list of supported carrier keys at {supported_carriers_url}.

old_number.name: Old Tracking Number
old_number.description: The original tracking number of the parcel

old_type.name: Old Type
old_type.description: The original type of the parcel (e.g., package)

detect_carrier.name: Detect Carrier
detect_carrier.description: Detect the carrier from a tracking number

tracking_number.name: Tracking Number
tracking_number.description: The tracking number to identify the carrier for
